name: NRHIS Sprint 2 Build050 Production USGS Basin Harvest
features: harvest live USGS instantaneous values for six Nueces-Frio basin stations
normalize discharge, gage height, water temperature, and specific conductance
archive raw API responses and machine-readable receipts
append observations without duplicate records on rerun
flag stale, provisional, missing, and invalid observations
publish current-condition JSON and CSV plus station status CSV
calculate explicitly labeled estimated TDS using the locked 0.65 factor
